remarks: Bright and spacious apartment full of charm and character with heat & hot water included! This inviting unit features hardwood floors, tall ceilings, and an abundance of natural light throughout. Extra space upon entry offers the perfect setup for a home office, reading nook, or additional living area. Residents enjoy on-site washer/dryer access, a beautifully maintained courtyard, and pet-friendly living with restrictions. Conveniently located just about 55-65 minutes by Metro-North train to NYC, making it a great option for commuters looking to enjoy more space and character outside the city. 2 cats or 1 cat & one small dog under 35lbs accepted with extra pet fees. Plenty of off street unassigned parking in rear lot for multiple cars or visitors. Garage parking available for additional fee.
